name: msvg
description: MotionSVG tooling for Claude Code — create, animate, validate, and preview schema-first SVG animation packages.

plugins.name: msvg
plugins.description: Author, validate, and preview MotionSVG (msvg) animation packages: scaffold valid packages, apply the house animation rules (linear clip easing, seamless loops, bounds discipline), run the validator, and serve a live gallery. Ships the msvg-animator agent plus /msvg:create, /msvg:animate, /msvg:validate, and /msvg:preview skills.
